title: Publish the claim/provenance graph as a reusable open dataset
context: Backlog: publish ATLTUAE's claim/provenance graph as a reusable open dataset under CC-BY-4.0, with a datasheet and full license lineage, so others can build on the verified, content-addressed knowledge graph. Must honor the license gate (only open/PD/CC-derived content) and the privacy filter (no personal data).
objective: Publish the claim/provenance graph as a reusable open dataset (CC-BY-4.0) with a datasheet and per-source license lineage, including only license-clean, privacy-filtered content and preserving content-addressed provenance.
acceptanceCriteria: Publishes the claim/provenance graph as a CC-BY-4.0 dataset with a datasheet (contents, schema, provenance, intended use, limitations)
Records per-source license lineage incl. share-alike attribution; contains only open/PD/CC-derived, privacy-filtered content (no personal data)
Dataset entries retain content-addressed provenance so claims remain re-derivable
